message:
feat(mvcc): re-export synthetic workload evaluation API at crate root

Extends the existing `pub use writer_routing_telemetry::{...}`
re-export block with the new synthetic workload evaluation
types and functions added in the
`feat(mvcc): add deterministic synthetic workload evaluation
for writer routing` commit.

Newly re-exported:

- `WriterRoutingMode` — baseline vs routed routing strategy
- `WriterRoutingPlacementProfile` — home hint placement
  profile (baseline unpinned, home-lane pinned, home-node
  pinned)
- `WriterRoutingSyntheticWorkload` — workload shape enum
  (disjoint, overlapping, hot-page-contention)
- `WriterRoutingSyntheticConfig` — config for one run
- `WriterRoutingSyntheticSummary` — per-run summary with
  latency vector, fairness slice, and every observed
  counter
- `WriterRoutingSyntheticFairnessSummary` — fairness slice
  split out for callers that only care about load balance
- `WriterRoutingSyntheticComparison` — paired baseline vs
  routed result
- `evaluate_writer_routing_synthetic_workload` — the
  entry-point function for one run
- `compare_writer_routing_synthetic_workload` — convenience
  wrapper that runs both modes on the same input

With this block, downstream crates and test harnesses can
import the full synthetic-workload evaluation API directly
from the crate root (`use fsqlite_mvcc::{...};`) without
reaching into `writer_routing_telemetry` internals. Alphabetical
ordering of the re-export block is preserved so rustfmt does
not rewrite it on the next commit.

files.patch:
@@ -397,11 +397,15 @@ pub use writer_routing_telemetry::{
     WriterHomeHintDisposition, WriterLockHolderClue, WriterOwnershipLineageTelemetry,
     WriterRetryAttribution, WriterRetryCause, WriterRoutingDecision, WriterRoutingDecisionConfig,
     WriterRoutingDecisionError, WriterRoutingDecisionReason, WriterRoutingHintDegradation,
-    WriterRoutingLaneId, WriterRoutingLaneScore, WriterRoutingLaneSnapshot, WriterRoutingNodeId,
+    WriterRoutingLaneId, WriterRoutingLaneScore, WriterRoutingLaneSnapshot, WriterRoutingMode,
+    WriterRoutingNodeId, WriterRoutingPlacementProfile, WriterRoutingSyntheticComparison,
+    WriterRoutingSyntheticConfig, WriterRoutingSyntheticFairnessSummary,
+    WriterRoutingSyntheticSummary, WriterRoutingSyntheticWorkload,
     WriterRoutingTelemetryCaptureCost, WriterRoutingTelemetryClass, WriterRoutingTelemetryInput,
     WriterRoutingTelemetryPhase, WriterRoutingTelemetryShape, WriterRoutingTelemetrySignal,
     WriterRoutingTelemetrySourceSpec, WriterTierSurfaceCounts, WriterTouchSurfaceTelemetry,
-    decide_writer_routing_target,
+    compare_writer_routing_synthetic_workload, decide_writer_routing_target,
+    evaluate_writer_routing_synthetic_workload,
 };
 pub use xor_delta::{
     DEFAULT_DELTA_THRESHOLD_PCT, DELTA_FIXED_OVERHEAD_BYTES, DELTA_HEADER_BYTES, DELTA_MAGIC,
